mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectById */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS role_type_cd_nm FROM sy_role r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'ROLE_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.role_type_cd WHERE r.role_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(r.*) /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_role r
